name: revit_create_reference_plane
description: Creates or lists reference planes relative to walls, floors, or free coordinates in the active document.

host_element_id.description: Optional wall or floor host for host-based creation

bubble_end.description: Bubble end XYZ for free reference plane creation

free_end.description: Free end XYZ for free reference plane creation

notes: Use ReferencePlaneMgr without ReferencePlaneForm; support list mode when no creation args supplied.
